changes: To improve usability for colorblind players, the color of the icons for astral fire and umbral ice in the simplified black mage job gauge has been adjusted.
Holy Spirit: Potency increased from 1,250 to 1,500.
Requiescat: The effect increasing potency up to 400% has been reduced to 200%.
Assassinate: Potency now increases up to a maximum of 2,500.
Flamethrower: Duration reduced from 10 to 5 seconds.
Flamethrower: Additional effect potency increased from 250 to 400.
Flamethrower: Maximum stacks reduced from 10 to 5.
Vercure: Healing potency increased from 1,500 to 2,000.
Monomachy: Recast time reduced from 45 to 30 seconds.
Regen: MP cost increased from 500 to 750.
Chain Stratagem: Duration reduced from 6 to 5 seconds.

new_content.name: Rival Wings
new_content.description: A large-scale PvP battle involving up to 48 combatants divided into two teams (Falcons and Ravens) that incorporates goblin-made machina.

new_content.name: Performance Actions
new_content.description: A system allowing players to create music using the bard job through specific musical note actions.

new_content.name: Plucking the Heartstrings
new_content.description: Quest required to unlock the Performance Actions system.

new_content.name: Earning Your Wings
new_content.description: Quest required to unlock the Rival Wings PvP encounter.

housing.name: Birds of Prey Orchestrion Roll
housing.description: Music roll for Birds of Prey. Use to add to your orchestrion list.

glamour.name: Nomad's Coat of Casting
glamour.description: Equipment which had a display issue when equipped by a Roegadyn male.

glamour.name: Far Eastern Noble's Robe
glamour.description: Equipment which had a display issue when equipped by a Lalafell.
